newsSince: Since June 9, the Amazon 'third hyperscaler' fiber deal (announced Jun 8) was already in the prior case, but incremental positives have firmed: an explicit 10x U.S. optical-capacity expansion (three new NC/TX plants, 3,000+ jobs), CEO June-12 commentary on customer risk-sharing provisions, and a wave of analyst PT raises (Truist to $205, UBS to $228). The +10.87% move is largely continued re-rating of known deals rather than a fresh catalyst.

sources.label: RCR Wireless - Corning as key AI infra supplier (Jun 11)
EBC - Corning AI optical Nvidia/Amazon/Meta focus
TIKR - Corning rose 11% on Amazon AI fiber deal

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha lens: the 10x capacity plan and PT raises confirm thesis but are now consensus, eroding the under-owned residual. Amazon deal already priced in prior case; +10.87% bounce de-crowds little. Mild fundamental confirm only.
verdicts.bull: Three locked-in hyperscaler fiber megadeals plus 10x capacity buildout cement Corning as the AI optical-connectivity bottleneck supplier.
verdicts.neutral: Strong thesis, but the residual-vs-passives edge shrinks as deals and PT raises become consensus.
verdicts.bear: Now fully mainstream and possibly 40% overvalued; capex/factory-delay execution risk and order-timing volatility if AI buildout slows.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: 10x optical capacity ramp and additional hyperscaler fiber commitments.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded re-rating; factory-ramp delays and AI-capex timing volatility.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent under-covered lens cuts against GLW: thesis itself notes connectivity is now mainstream after Nvidia/Corning news, not early alpha. Fresh PT raises and 10x plan push it further into consensus, eroding latent-node fit.
verdicts.bull: Optical/photonics demand has structural multi-year runway via three megadeals and capacity expansion.
verdicts.neutral: Strategically strong but no longer an under-covered latent name; conviction is rightly Low here.
verdicts.bear: Fully discovered and widely owned; offers no residual latent edge on an under-coverage list.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Continued hyperscaler optical deals and capacity ramp.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Loss of latent/under-coverage premium as the name becomes consensus AI infra.
